title: Spatial Risk Assessment of Foot and Mouth Disease
description: Foot and mouth disease (FMD) is a highly contagious viral disease that affects cloven-hoofed animals and causes substantial economic losses. This study aimed to conduct a spatial risk assessment of FMD in Sukabumi Regency, Indonesia, to identify high-risk areas and guide mitigation efforts. The research integrated Geographic Information Systems (GIS) and Multicriteria Decision Analysis (MCDA) using the Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP). The findings highlight the critical role of livestock movement and trade connectivity in FMD transmission. The risk map generated in this study can be a valuable tool for policymakers and veterinary authorities to prioritize interventions, allocate resources effectively, and implement targeted strategies to mitigate FMD risk. The integrated GIS and MCDA approach offers a replicable framework for spatial risk assessment of FMD in other regions with similar challenges.

title: Random Forest Risk Mapping of Foot-and-Mouth Disease in Sukabumi Regency, Indonesia
description: Foot-and-Mouth Disease (FMD) is a highly contagious viral disease that severely impacts livestock economies, especially in regions like Sukabumi Regency, Indonesia, where livestock farming is vital. This study aimed to assess the spatial risk of FMD in Sukabumi using Random Forest (RF) and Geographic Information Systems (GIS) to produce a comprehensive risk map. The objective was to identify high-risk zones and understand the key factors influencing FMD outbreaks in the region. A Random Forest model was trained and validated using these predictors, with data split into training and testing subsets. Performance metrics, such as accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, and AUC, were used to evaluate model effectiveness.

title: EpiMetricsID
description:
EpiMetricsId adalah aplikasi web analitik epidemiologi berbasis Python/Flask yang dirancang untuk membantu pengguna mengunggah, mengeksplorasi, menganalisis, dan memvisualisasikan data epidemiologi secara praktis dalam satu workspace.

Aplikasi ini menyediakan fitur perhitungan ukuran sampel, analisis deskriptif, visualisasi plot, analisis tabel 2x2 seperti OR/RR/PR, analisis bivariat, regresi OLS, regresi logistik binomial, dan regresi logistik multinomial, juga dilengkapi modul Uji Diagnostik serta modul Spatio-temporal Map

title: status-kitwan.dvmanalytics.id
description: Status Kitwan adalah aplikasi peta interaktif untuk menampilkan status situasi penyakit hewan di Indonesia berdasarkan wilayah kabupaten/kota, mengacu pada Kepmentan No.287/KPTS/HK.150/M/04/2026.  Aplikasi ini memungkinkan pengguna memilih jenis penyakit hewan, seperti PMK, LSD, ASF, Rabies, HPAI, Brucellosis, Anthraks, CSF, SE, Jembrana, dan Surra, lalu melihat klasifikasi wilayah berdasarkan status Bebas, Terduga, atau Tertular.
